title: New scenario: metric-cardinality-control (Cardinality control with prometheus.relabel)
description:
## What this scenario demonstrates

Control metric **cardinality and cost** with `prometheus.relabel` — drop high-cardinality labels (e.g. dynamic IDs, query params), drop entire noisy series, and rename/aggregate — before `remote_write`. The pull-model, Prometheus-native counterpart to the OTel `otel-examples/cost-control` scenario.

## Why users want it

Cardinality blow-up is the #1 metrics cost driver. Showing concrete relabel rules that cut a metric's series count is broadly requested and e
